title: Elementi Drink Mixer Handheld - Powerful Protein Powder Mixer, Easy to Use Handheld Drink Frother Wand for Quick Delicious Cocktails, Milk Frother Coffee Wand, Coffee Stirrers Electric Mini
description:
About this item
PERFECT DRINK MIXER FOR ENTHUSIASTS: Powered by a high-speed, high-torque motor, this drink mixer effortlessly creates rich, foamed milk in 15-20 seconds. Whether you're frothing milk or blending your favorite drinks, this tool is designed for powerful performance (2xAA batteries not included).
PEACE OF MIND GUARANTEED: Enjoy complete confidence with our 2-year warranty. At Elementi, we’re committed to your satisfaction, ensuring that any concerns are addressed quickly and hassle-free. Your happiness is always our priority.
BE YOUR OWN MIXOLOGIST: Use this versatile drink mixer to whip up smooth microfoam for lattes, cappuccinos, matcha, and more. Whether you’re working with almond milk, cow’s milk, or even crafting Keto Coffee or whipped hot chocolate, this drink mixer brings café-quality beverages to your kitchen. The ideal addition to your coffee bar accessories.
ERGONOMIC AND EASY TO USE: Designed for comfort and ease, this handheld drink mixer features a soft-touch grip and a compact, cordless design. Measuring 11 inches tall and 2 inches wide, it’s simple to operate and store, making it an essential addition to your kitchen.
NOT JUST FOR COFFEE: From mixing protein powders to creating frothy cold foam, this powerful drink mixer goes beyond coffee. Use it as a handheld blender, matcha whisk, or to mix your favorite beverages quickly and efficiently. It’s the ultimate tool for all your drink-mixing needs.
reviews_5s:
This is a great replacement for a cheaper type that died. Much more powerful & larger whisk circle. There's only 2 caveats which I felt needed to be mentioned but don't subtract from the 5 stars I gave:
1. Due to arthritis & aging gnarly hands, I found it difficult to hold & turn on - an on/off switch would have worked better for me. But for those of you with still muscular thumbs & fingers, not a problem. I think, in time, I'll figure out an easier way.
2. It is much more powerful than the squeaky little thing I received free with some coffee related purchase - hence, I had to clean up the counter a couple of times before I realized that I could just put less coffee in the cup or use a bigger mug. I use sugar & powdered whole milk in my coffee - this mixed it quite nicely leaving no lumps like the previous frother left.

Great little frother, love the red color since I can find it. Will figure out the arthritis & fill logistics eventually.

UPDATE: had this for a couple of weeks now & although the arthritic hands haven't changed (I wish), I have managed to learn how to hold it in such a way that I can moderate the speed once I get it going...damn you, old thumb! Anyway, it's a great little gadget.

TIP - If you bought the one without the stand, rinse it, wipe off &/or point the whisk part down. Otherwise, water can seep back into the motor area & eventually send it to the appliance graveyard.This little gadget works great, powerful, i use to mix protein powder into milk or water and no clumps or lumps always a smooth outcome. Its light weight rasy to store. It a very good price and its durable. very easy to clean, i love it and I highly recomend.For the price. I did not expect the froster to work as well it does. It beats all my expectations on speed, power and blending. Can’t speak for durability yet as I just had to this item for two weeks only.The frother works great as I use it to mix supplements, electrolytes, and occasional lattes too!.

This is the 3rd frother I have purchased from Amazon. As with the prior ones, they stopped working and I replaced the batteries and then they wouldn't work. Elementi has excellent customer service and sent me a replacement the next day.

I'm happy to say - the new frother is great and I highly recommend purchasing from Elementi!I mix a lot of powders into drinks and was tired of having to wait for things to absorb and break apart so I could stir it in fully. This mixes all my drink powders in like 5 seconds without any clumps or chunks left on my mugs or glasses. Ridiculous how I love this thing already. Easy use. Easy clean up. Super powerful. You need one of these! Don't hesitate because you think you need a more expensive one. You don't. Incredible value.This is the 2nd one I have purchased. I bought the first one 18 months ago and it would still be working fine except that my husband used it to mix up something that it wasn't designed for and he broke it. This frother is the best one I've used and I've tried several. Very happy with my purchase.Works well great priceThis is the best thing I bought in 2024. My entire family now uses this in place of a spoon. We love it.I absolutely love adding frothed milk to my morning coffee, just adds a touch of sweetness. I purchased this in June and when the shaft of it broke I didn’t expect much of a response to my email to Customer support.

Surprisingly they were extremely responsive and sent out a new one right away. Back to my morning coffee ritual! One satisfied customer here!!This product works great!
reviews_1s: Wish it was rechargeable. Blows through batteryAfter less than a year of use the wand no longer turns on. Even after replacing the batteries, the wand does not turn on anymore.Worked for mixing a drink but battery was always going dead.Used it once and it hasn't worked since. Garbage. Don't waste your money!It stopped working after I used around four times.I bought this a month ago and only used it a hand full of times and it stopped working. I changed the batteries and still nothing.Stopped working after two uses. Feels incredibly cheap. You get what you pay for. Amazon issued me a refund.I bought this because my daughter likes to make ice coffees with soft tops (like Starbucks). It broke!! We only had it for maybe a week and she only used it a few times!! The little whisk part just flew off. I guess you get what you pay for.......Does not provide batteries. Did not even work when I bought my own batteries and put them in.Product worked well on first use. But worked for literally only one use. Did not turn on after so really unfortunate. Didn’t want to bother with returning so just stuck with this broken item. Sigh.
